title: Extra Concrete
description: Adds concrete slabs and stairs in all 16 colors to Minecraft, making building with concrete much more versatile!
body:
**Extra Concrete** is a lightweight building expansion mod that introduces **slabs** and **stairs** for all **16 concrete colors** in Minecraft.
If you love building with concrete but always felt limited by the lack of smaller block variants, this mod is exactly what you need.

## 🧱 Features

✔ **Concrete Slabs** in every vanilla color (16 total)

✔ **Concrete Stairs** in every vanilla color (16 total)

✔ Fully integrated into the **creative inventory**

✔ Matches the **vanilla textures and style** perfectly

✔ Simple, clean, and **lightweight** – focused only on building blocks

## 🎨 Why Extra Concrete?

Concrete is one of the most **colorful and modern-looking blocks** in Minecraft, but in vanilla it’s restricted to full blocks only. With **Extra Concrete**, you finally get the freedom to:

Build **colorful staircases** and rooftops

Use **slabs for smoother transitions** in your builds

Design **modern architecture** with clean shapes

Stay fully **consistent in style** without mixing in other materials

## 🔧 Compatibility

✅ Works in **Survival** and **Creative**

✅ Fully compatible with **vanilla Minecraft** and other mods

✅ No special setup needed – just install and start building

## 🚀 Perfect for Builders

Whether you are a **casual player** who wants more color variety in your base, or a **dedicated builder** creating detailed cities and modern structures, **Extra Concrete** gives you the missing block variants that Minecraft always needed.

Bring your creativity to the next level – with **Extra Concrete**!
